description: Create a content slide with a clustered vertical bar chart showing participation in in-destination travel activities by household income segment, highlighting average rates and 2025 intent markers in a full-width layout.

header.headline: In-destination providers can expect higher demand from higher-income travelers, but a more conservative approach at the lower end

main.title: Participation in in-destination travel activities, lodging travelers
labels: Guided day trip or sightseeing tour
Ticketed or public event (e.g., festivals, concerts)

footer.source: 2026 Deloitte Summer Travel Survey. Notes: Question: “Which of the following experiences are you likely to participate in on this trip?” (Select all that apply) (n = 1,808); 2025 incidence is only noted where there is a notable shift.
